$meta.resolutionNote: Node 1:3 does not exist in the current file. The Home page frame is 1:32 on the '🖌️ Final Designs' page (0:1). Treating 1:32 as the home page.

page.name: Homepage
page.compositionNote: Top-level layers are flat (not nested into 'section' frames). Many hero layers overlap visually in the y=0–1175 band. The grouping below reconstructs visual top-to-bottom sections; nested figma layer ids are listed under 'figmaLayerIds' for each section.

sections.description: Top sticky/anchored navigation bar overlaying the hero. Contains the Bodhi wordmark on the left and primary nav links / CTA on the right.

Full-bleed marketing hero. Devanagari 'बोधि' display lockup over a large lifestyle image, with the tagline 'बोधि · The awakening — A school for teachers and a home for seekers.' (group 1:83), a decorative rounded image card (75:3228), and a horizontal 'what do we offer' offer-strip with arrowed CTAs (1:591) sitting at the bottom of the hero. A thin top border (1:53) separates the hero from the next section.
interactiveElements: primary CTA in offer-strip 'I want to teach Yoga & Pillate →'

subBlocks.note: Background image + large Devanagari 'बोधि' display text, y=0, w=1920, h=1175
Secondary image frame, y=221, h=1200 — likely the lifestyle photo card
Headline lockup 'A school for teachers and a home for seekers.' x=308 y=292, 1059x385
Horizontal 'what do we offer / I want to teach Yoga & Pillate →' chips, y=859, h=143
Bottom border with niche labels Yama / Niyama / Āsana / Prāṇāyāma, y=1102, h=73

sections.description: Editorial quote band labelled 'Our practice'. Two-column layout: the founder's quote 'The mat is a place to meet yourself honestly, daily, and without performance.' on the left with attribution '— Acharya, founder', complemented by supporting copy/imagery on the right.
Horizontal stats / proof band. Big numeric callouts such as '5000+ Students Trained' and '15+ Years of Excellence' presented as evenly-spaced columns.

'What we do — Three rooms in one school.' feature list. Introduces the three pillars (Personalized Classes, 200/300-hour residential & weekend TTCs, etc.) as side-by-side cards with short descriptions.

'Why Bodhi School of Yoga? — What We Stand For' value-prop block. Bulleted promises such as 'Making yoga accessible & empowering for every woman' and 'Offering accredited TTCs that reflect women's unique needs', paired with supporting imagery.

Programs catalogue. Two sub-blocks: 'Yoga Teacher Training Courses' (e.g. 'Pranayama & the nervous system', 4 weeks) and 'Certification Courses' shown as a card grid with thumbnail, title, duration, and arrow link per program.

'Recognizing the Global Impact of Yoga' — accreditation/affiliation logo strip with named bodies such as AIVETC and Jyotish Yoga Sastra University. Typically a horizontal row of monochrome partner logos with a section header.

alreadyBuilt.note: 1:130 is the inner frame directly inside the wrapper group 1:129; both refer to this section.

sections.description: 'What our clients say' testimonial block. Headed by a large decorative quote glyph, with a student testimonial (e.g. '— Aanya, TTC Cohort 11. Now teaching in Goa.') and likely additional testimonial cards or a carousel.

alreadyBuilt.note: 1:558 is the inner frame directly inside wrapper group 1:557; both refer to this section.

sections.description: Final 'Begin where you are.' closing CTA band sitting on top of the dark teal site footer. Footer contains the Bodhi wordmark, the tagline 'A school for teachers, a home for seekers. Practice, taught honestly.', the contact line 'bodhischoolofyoga.com', and a 'School' link column.

alreadyBuilt.note: Single Figma group 1:619 was split into two React components: the CTA band and the site footer.
